info.title: SOAP and REST DAST Lab - XML/SOAP API
info.description: Swagger-style documentation for the XML/SOAP attack lab. SOAPAction selects the operation.

head.description: HEAD returns only response headers and no body. Use it for DAST verb discovery and metadata checks.

options.description: OPTIONS returns the Allow and Access-Control-Allow-Methods headers for verb discovery.

204.description: Allow header lists: GET, HEAD, OPTIONS

post.summary: SOAP endpoint for business and risk demonstration operations
post.description: Do not use this endpoint for authentication. Use POST /soap/auth with SOAPAction Login or ValidateToken. Use POST /soap/refreshtoken with SOAPAction RefreshToken.

parameters.name: X-Forwarded-For
parameters.description: Optional source IP evidence header captured by /login-audit.

head.description: HEAD returns only response headers and no body. Use it for DAST verb discovery and metadata checks.

options.description: OPTIONS returns the Allow and Access-Control-Allow-Methods headers for verb discovery.

204.description: Allow header lists: GET, POST, HEAD, OPTIONS

post.summary: Dedicated SOAP authentication endpoint for Login and ValidateToken
post.description: Use this endpoint with SOAPAction Login to obtain AccessToken/RefreshToken and SOAPAction ValidateToken to validate the current access token. Use /soap/refreshtoken for refresh token reauthentication. All auth interactions are written to the audit log.

parameters.name: X-Forwarded-For
parameters.description: Optional source IP evidence header captured by /login-audit.

head.description: HEAD returns only response headers and no body. Use it for DAST verb discovery and metadata checks.

options.description: OPTIONS returns the Allow and Access-Control-Allow-Methods headers for verb discovery.

204.description: Allow header lists: GET, POST, HEAD, OPTIONS

post.description: Use this endpoint with SOAPAction RefreshToken to exchange a refresh token for a new dynamic access token. Refresh token interactions are written to the audit log and /login-tracking.

parameters.name: X-Forwarded-For
parameters.description: Optional source IP evidence header captured by /login-audit.
